nodes.arrangement: Root page contains state containers in semantic sequence.
nodes.sizing: Fills available carrier width with scrollable height.
nodes.scroll_behavior: Owns vertical scroll without contradiction to child scrolling.
nodes.width_behavior: Children wrap and stack inside parent width.

nodes.arrangement: Renderable ready-state page frame appears before blocked state frame.
nodes.sizing: Uses page-frame content height with readable minimum sizing.
nodes.scroll_behavior: Participates in parent scroll without contradiction.
nodes.width_behavior: Wraps ready-state content inside parent width.

nodes.arrangement: Ready state appears before blocked state.
nodes.sizing: Uses content height with readable minimum sizing.
nodes.scroll_behavior: Participates in parent scroll without contradiction.
nodes.width_behavior: Wraps status content inside parent width.

nodes.arrangement: Renderable blocked-state page frame follows ready-state frame.
nodes.sizing: Uses page-frame content height with readable minimum sizing.
nodes.scroll_behavior: Participates in parent scroll without contradiction.
nodes.width_behavior: Wraps blocked-state content inside parent width.

nodes.sizing: Uses content height with readable minimum sizing.
nodes.scroll_behavior: Participates in parent scroll without contradiction.
nodes.width_behavior: Wraps status content inside parent width.

nodes.arrangement: Renderable human-review waiting page frame follows blocked-state frame.
nodes.sizing: Uses page-frame content height and may expand for the message.
nodes.scroll_behavior: Participates in parent scroll without contradiction.
nodes.width_behavior: Wraps waiting-state content inside parent width.

nodes.arrangement: Human review waiting state contains the blocked review message.
nodes.sizing: Uses content height and may expand for the message.
nodes.scroll_behavior: Participates in parent scroll without contradiction.
nodes.width_behavior: Wraps child message content inside parent width.

nodes.arrangement: Message group places reason before required next step.
nodes.sizing: Uses readable content height with expansion.
nodes.scroll_behavior: Uses local expansion and parent scroll without contradiction.
nodes.width_behavior: Wraps long text; does not clip required information.
